The Darkest Hour (2011)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $21,443,494Details
International Box Office $43,183,292
Worldwide Box Office $64,626,786
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $5,478,760
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $3,992,429
Total $9,471,189
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$2,993,519 (14.0% of total gross)
Legs:5.15 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:33.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$34,800,000 (worldwide box office is 1.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,324 opening theaters/2,327 max. theaters, 3.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $32,285,469

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 25th, 2011 (Wide) by Summit Entertainment
International Releases: April 20th, 2012 (Wide) (Venezuela)
Video Release: April 10th, 2012 by Summit Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sci-fi action violence and some language.
(Rating bulletin 2169, 4/27/2011)
Running Time: 89 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Scene in End Credits, Visual Effects
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Shot in 3-D
Geographical setting: Russia
Plot point: Betrayal, Entrepreneur
Social setting: Alien Invasion
Subgenre: Action Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Regency Enterprises, Summit Entertainment, New Regency, Bazelevs Company, Jacobson Company
Production Countries: United States, Russian Federation
Languages: English, Russian
